response.original_title: What happens if my Jetstar flight is cancelled?Step-by-Step Solution
response.overview: 🌏+61 1800 868 633  If your Jetstar flight is cancelled, the airline will usually arrange an alternative flight at no extra cost or offer you a refund or travel credit. 🌏+61 1800 868 633  UK: +44-800-054-8541. MX: +52-800-351-0319. For longer delays, you may also receive support such as meals or accommodation, depending on the circumstances. It’s best to check your booking online to review your options and select the one that suits your travel plans.UK: +44-800-054-8541. MX: +52-800-351-0319.
